Action: Business Issuer creates credential offer; Wallet collects offer and requests token using DPoP proof
Data:
- Credential offer deeplink
- DPoP proof (JWT with thumbprint)
- Pre-authorized code
- Token endpoint
Expected Result: Issuer returns HTTP 200 with access token; DPoP binding confirmed

Action: Wallet generates holder keys and creates DPoP-bound credential proof; Wallet requests credential using DPoP proof
Data:
- Access token
- DPoP proof with matching thumbprint
- Credential request with DPoP binding
Expected Result: Issuer returns HTTP 200 with DPoP-bound credential

Action: Verifier requests encrypted presentation; Wallet creates and submits DPoP-bound encrypted presentation
Data:
- Verification request requiring encryption
- DPoP proof with matching binding
- Encrypted presentation JWT
Expected Result: Verifier accepts presentation; verification state is SUCCESS
